title: Synthetic Linear-style issue template
description: Records resemble Linear issues used as inputs to dev-manager decomposition / triage evals. No real-customer references, no real public figures.

issue_id.description: e.g., ENG-123. Synthetic — never collides with real production project prefixes.

project.description: Project prefix. Distribution: ENG 35%, OPS 15%, DATA 15%, INFRA 10%, QA 10%, ML 10%, GROWTH 5%.

title.description: Short title. Length distribution: short 20% (5–30 chars), medium 60% (30–80), long 20% (80–120). Tone register varies.

body.description: Issue body. Length distribution: short (<100 words) 30%, medium (100–400) 50%, long (400+) 20%. Mix of bug reports, feature requests, refactor proposals, investigation tasks.

labels.description: Generator combines a kind-label + priority-label, sometimes adding a workflow label.

requester.description: Synthetic display name. Mix of regions; never real-customer, never real public figure.

assignee.description: ~40% of records have an assignee, 60% are null.

estimate_points.description: Fibonacci point estimate. ~50% of records have an estimate.

blocked_by.description: Optional cross-issue dependency. ~15% of records reference 1–2 other synthetic issues.
